The Nilgiris.col_6:
Proposal is sent to
CLA for issue of final
transfer order of the
allotted and the same
is under process at
CLA- Chennai.

Madurai.Construction yet to\nstart (brief status:
Plan approval
obtained from
DTCP and
Panchayat approval
obtained from
Thoppur
Panchayat.
Estimation work is
being undertaken
by the Architect.
On completion of
estimation work, e-
tender will be
floated and within
30 days tender will
be finalised and
construction work
will be started.

Cuddalore.Construction yet to\nstart (brief status:
Architect and
Engineer report yet
to be submitted to
our corporate
office for further
process.

Dharmapuri.Construction yet to\nstart (brief status:
Document
submitted to
Architect for
applying DTCP
Approval.

Kanchipuram.col_6:
New land identified
near Walajabad on
29.02.2024. The site
was visited by PD
TNSRLM, SDR, LDM &
Director.

Krishnagiri.Construction yet to\nstart (brief status:
Land identified and
demarcation done
to the extent of
1.00 acre. Land has
been transferred
from Revenue Dept
to BDO
Veppanapalli on
10.08.2023.
Architect visited
the site and the
land has to cleaned
for futher process.
Request sent to CO
for expenditure
approval related to
land cleaning.

Namakkal.Construction yet to\nstart (brief status:
Subdivision of
allotted land is
pending. Hence,
we are regulary
following with
colllectorate for
the same. After
subdivision of land,
we will proceed
with applying for
DTCP aproval.

Thiruvallur.Awaiting approval\nof building plan\nfro:
Awaiting approval
from head office
for the
expenditure for
land cleaning and
boundary marking.

Tiruvannamalai.Awaiting approval\nof building plan\nfro:
Building Plan sent
for approval to our
Central Office.

Kanniyakumari.Awaiting approval\nof building plan\nfro:
DTCP approval
received on
22/09/2023 and
Building
permission from
Municipality was
obtained on
09/11/2023. The
Tender process is
ongoing for
selection of
Contractor.

Karur.Awaiting approval\nof building plan\nfro:
Vacant land tax to
be paid for the
allotted land.
Hence We have
applied for vacant
land tax
assessment on
21.02.2024. The
Tender process is
ongoing for
selection of
Contractor.

Perambalur.The building\nestimate was\napproved by:
The building
estimate has been
approved by the
central office. The
tender floating for
selection of
contractor is under
process at our
Central office.

Ramanathapuram.The building\nestimate was\napproved by:
DTCP approval
received on
30/10/2023 and
Building
permission from
Panchayat was
obtained on
14/12/2023. Fire
NOC obtained on
03.01.2024. The
Architect
submitted the
detailed estimate
for floating the
tender to the
sponsor bank
controlling office.

Tenkasi.The building\nestimate was\napproved by:
DTCP approval
obtained. Awaiting
panchayat
approval.

Thiruvarur.The building\nestimate was\napproved by:
Due to the issues
with insufficient
main entrance
pathway problem,
we are unable to
apply for DTCP
approval. Hence,
requested for
alternate land and
respected District
Collector accepted
our request. New
land not yet
identified.

Tiruchirappalli.The building\nestimate was\napproved by:
Interim stay on
allotted has been
issued on
11.01.2024. Hence,
we have requested
for allotment of
alternate land on
28.02.2024.
